channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quatre mois avec RunMotion Coach : j’ai encore pulvérisé mon record au semi-marathon
item.description: Pour préparer le semi-marathon de Paris 2026, j'ai passé quatre mois avec l'application d'entraînement de course à pied RunMotion Coach.

item.title: Sam's Club Coupons and Deals: Save up to 60% in March 2026
item.description: Save on bulk groceries, household essentials, and electronics with a verified Sam's Club promo code or membership discount.

item.title: Expedia Coupons and Deals: Up to 75% Off Select Trips
item.description: Book your next getaway with Expedia and get up to 75% off your stay, with or without a promo code.

item.title: Dermstore Promo Codes and Deals: Save Up to 25%
item.description: Score major savings on premium skincare, hair care, and cosmetics with these verified Dermstore discount codes and rewards offers.

item.title: H&R Block Coupon: 25% Off DIY + Tax Pro Assist
item.description: Save over 25% when you opt for H&R Block’s free online offering, plus a tax pro review.

item.title: KitchenAid Promo Codes and Discounts: Save Up to 20%
item.description: Save on every purchase with top KitchenAid coupons from WIRED, including up to 20% off countertop appliances.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for March 17, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: How to watch Champions League live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Live stream the 2025-26 Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: 5 AI features coming to your next car
item.description: We’re inching ever closer to K.I.T.T. from ‘Knight Rider.’ Remember when cars were just . . . cars? You turned a key, explosions happened under the hood, and wheels turned. It was simple. It was glorious.

item.title: A tiny discount makes the iPhone 17 the better buy compared to the more affordable iPhone 17e — here's why
item.description: The iPhone 17e may be the exciting new sub-AU$1,000 iPhone, but snagging the iPhone 17 for even just AU$50 is still the better buy for a fair few reasons, and I've broken them down for you.
